'''Elon Vedij''' was [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[TIE pilot]] from the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], who was the younger brother of [[Dhas Fenoep Vedij]] and the son of [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Ronnan Tyla Vedij]]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] he was posted to the same ship as his brother, who was serving as [[Executive officer/Legends|executive officer]] on board the ''[[Far Orbit]]''. Dhas suspected this was to make the removal of the Vedij family, whose loyalty to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was apparently suspect, easier.

In any case, Elon died in combat with the [[Tarnished Blades|Silent Blades]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] after [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Vocis Kenit]] ordered all of his [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] to attack them in their asteroid lair. This wanton waste of sentient life convinced Dhas, his brother, to plan a mutiny.
